TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Luhay bay undo = Spoda ndan pnkla mita WHO pa, puqan ,sinaw, ini mnduwa mkan mi mimah, ini ttuku lmlu ka hiyi mi qthur hay, to so pusu bay abunay bnbur quru gang,kiya mi hmrinas turu tukingal gang u malu dan qmdahang kiya. Ida so mkla kana ka hbaraw bay sediq ou bay pkmalu hiyi ka undo, kcka na hiya knmalu na bay pa, kiya ka kmlih mpusal paseynto (20%) abunay bburan gang ka undo,kddiyax lluhay bay undo mturul pungkang daw kiya ka malu kmlih abunay dndulan gang qthur iraq,gang nunuh mi gang ruma kadi lbuwan, kiya ka iyu pdakar duma gang ka undo, malu pdakar knrudan uri. kndudul mrana ka kngkawas da hay, wada mkala ka dndulan narux gang uri. narux kknrudan ka narux gang; kkluwan owda pkmalu narux gang u, mray so pkuruc, hwaryaw, pkmalu pkrdaxun, pkmalu so cbuwan budi uxay daw so pkmalu ini ruyi narux u niqan ini pntna dndulan na, muda smliq tama baraq, neyhunmi, elu iraq lktu, ini ruyi narux, priyux nngari, singkey, baraq, sopkowic hiyi,mbba ka rayuh mi lmlamu mnarux, malu muda kmlih mkrda pkmalu narux gang brah mi pkmalu narux gang bukuy ka undo, tokubeycu bay ka so pmlih bay so pkowic hiyi, mmari lnglungan mi so ini tblayaq lnglungan, pkbiyax kana hiyi, pkrana knmalu hiyi quri pkmalu kndusan u wada niqan pnkla dha. Knkal iyax sngayan mnturu dhuq mnrima mturul pungkang undo tucka tubiyax yoyan uxay daw phmuk biyax (Pkhngak hari binaw so malu pprngaw kari niya) pkudus sipaw pkbiyax hiyi, malu ptura bay pmlih dndulan hiyi iyax pkmalu narux uxay daw babaw pkmalu narux. Nasi mnnarux ka sediq scuqi mowic hiyi uka brahan bbaraw diyax undo pa, malu spriyux mntxal maxal pungkang, ana so ini kbsiyaq mi prnaun ka muda, so malu dhuq hmrinas kbkuy mrimal pungkang ka ndan knkana undo knkal iyax sngayan. Ini srhuqi ka muda smung pkbiyax hiyi brah undo Undo ka sediq mnarux gang pa, ida asi ka qlhangun bay ka quri hiyi ta nanaq, so uxay mphuya ka iyax muda undo cida, mray so tnuwing tunux, thmuk brah uxay daw mnarux brah, ngalun lhbun uxay daw ini mnduwa ka tama baraq, ini ,mnduwa pshngak ka owda dndulan na, ya kiya ka pkla abunay ncahaya, asi ka msangay undo, kiya mi muda smiling ising hyaun ncahaya pnduwa. Pnyahan : Watan Diro / 編輯手:Robaw Harung
S.PHON: = luħaj baj undo = spoda ndan pnkla mita wħo pa, puqan ,sinaw, ini mnduwa mkan mi mimaħ, ini ttuku lmlu ka ħiji mi qtħuɾ ħaj, to so pusu baj abunaj bnbuɾ quɾu gaŋ,kija mi ħmɾinas tuɾu tukiŋal gaŋ u malu dan qmdaħaŋ kija. ida so mkla kana ka ħbaɾaw baj sədiq ou baj pkmalu ħiji ka undo, kʦka na ħija knmalu na baj pa, kija ka kmliħ mpusal pasənto (**%) abunaj bbuɾan gaŋ ka undo,kddijax lluħaj baj undo mtuɾul puŋkaŋ daw kija ka malu kmliħ abunaj dndulan gaŋ qtħuɾ iɾaq,gaŋ nunuħ mi gaŋ ɾuma kadi lbuwan, kija ka iju pdakaɾ duma gaŋ ka undo, malu pdakaɾ knɾudan uɾi. kndudul mɾana ka kŋkawas da ħaj, wada mkala ka dndulan naɾux gaŋ uɾi. naɾux kknɾudan ka naɾux gaŋ; kkluwan owda pkmalu naɾux gaŋ u, mɾaj so pkuɾuʦ, ħwaɾjaw, pkmalu pkɾdaxun, pkmalu so ʦbuwan budi uxaj daw so pkmalu ini ɾuji naɾux u niqan ini pntna dndulan na, muda smliq tama baɾaq, nəħunmi, əlu iɾaq lktu, ini ɾuji naɾux, pɾijux nŋaɾi, siŋkə, baɾaq, sopkowiʦ ħiji,mbba ka ɾajuħ mi lmlamu mnaɾux, malu muda kmliħ mkɾda pkmalu naɾux gaŋ bɾaħ mi pkmalu naɾux gaŋ bukuj ka undo, tokubəʦu baj ka so pmliħ baj so pkowiʦ ħiji, mmaɾi lŋluŋan mi so ini tblajaq lŋluŋan, pkbijax kana ħiji, pkɾana knmalu ħiji quɾi pkmalu kndusan u wada niqan pnkla dħa. knkal ijax sŋajan mntuɾu dħuq mnɾima mtuɾul puŋkaŋ undo tuʦka tubijax jojan uxaj daw pħmuk bijax (pkħŋak ħaɾi binaw so malu ppɾŋaw kaɾi nija) pkudus sipaw pkbijax ħiji, malu ptuɾa baj pmliħ dndulan ħiji ijax pkmalu naɾux uxaj daw babaw pkmalu naɾux. nasi mnnaɾux ka sədiq sʦuqi mowiʦ ħiji uka bɾaħan bbaɾaw dijax undo pa, malu spɾijux mntxal maxal puŋkaŋ, ana so ini kbsijaq mi pɾnaun ka muda, so malu dħuq ħmɾinas kbkuj mɾimal puŋkaŋ ka ndan knkana undo knkal ijax sŋajan. ini sɾħuqi ka muda smuŋ pkbijax ħiji bɾaħ undo undo ka sədiq mnaɾux gaŋ pa, ida asi ka qlħaŋun baj ka quɾi ħiji ta nanaq, so uxaj mpħuja ka ijax muda undo ʦida, mɾaj so tnuwiŋ tunux, tħmuk bɾaħ uxaj daw mnaɾux bɾaħ, ŋalun lħbun uxaj daw ini mnduwa ka tama baɾaq, ini ,mnduwa psħŋak ka owda dndulan na, ja kija ka pkla abunaj nʦaħaja, asi ka msaŋaj undo, kija mi muda smiliŋ isiŋ ħjaun nʦaħaja pnduwa. pnjaħan : watan diɾo / ***:ɾobaw ħaɾuŋ
S.FORM: = Luhay bay undo = Spoda ndan pnkla mita WHO pa, puqan ,sinaw, ini mnduwa mkan mi mimah, ini ttuku lmlu ka hiyi mi qthur hay, to so pusu bay abunay bnbur quru gang,kiya mi hmrinas turu tukingal gang u malu dan qmdahang kiya. Ida so mkla kana ka hbaraw bay sediq ou bay pkmalu hiyi ka undo, kcka na hiya knmalu na bay pa, kiya ka kmlih mpusal paseynto (20%) abunay bburan gang ka undo,kddiyax lluhay bay undo mturul pungkang daw kiya ka malu kmlih abunay dndulan gang qthur iraq,gang nunuh mi gang ruma kadi lbuwan, kiya ka iyu pdakar duma gang ka undo, malu pdakar knrudan uri. kndudul mrana ka kngkawas da hay, wada mkala ka dndulan narux gang uri. narux kknrudan ka narux gang; kkluwan owda pkmalu narux gang u, mray so pkuruc, hwaryaw, pkmalu pkrdaxun, pkmalu so cbuwan budi uxay daw so pkmalu ini ruyi narux u niqan ini pntna dndulan na, muda smliq tama baraq, neyhunmi, elu iraq lktu, ini ruyi narux, priyux nngari, singkey, baraq, sopkowic hiyi,mbba ka rayuh mi lmlamu mnarux, malu muda kmlih mkrda pkmalu narux gang brah mi pkmalu narux gang bukuy ka undo, tokubeycu bay ka so pmlih bay so pkowic hiyi, mmari lnglungan mi so ini tblayaq lnglungan, pkbiyax kana hiyi, pkrana knmalu hiyi quri pkmalu kndusan u wada niqan pnkla dha. Knkal iyax sngayan mnturu dhuq mnrima mturul pungkang undo tucka tubiyax yoyan uxay daw phmuk biyax (Pkhngak hari binaw so malu pprngaw kari niya) pkudus sipaw pkbiyax hiyi, malu ptura bay pmlih dndulan hiyi iyax pkmalu narux uxay daw babaw pkmalu narux. Nasi mnnarux ka sediq scuqi mowic hiyi uka brahan bbaraw diyax undo pa, malu spriyux mntxal maxal pungkang, ana so ini kbsiyaq mi prnaun ka muda, so malu dhuq hmrinas kbkuy mrimal pungkang ka ndan knkana undo knkal iyax sngayan. Ini srhuqi ka muda smung pkbiyax hiyi brah undo Undo ka sediq mnarux gang pa, ida asi ka qlhangun bay ka quri hiyi ta nanaq, so uxay mphuya ka iyax muda undo cida, mray so tnuwing tunux, thmuk brah uxay daw mnarux brah, ngalun lhbun uxay daw ini mnduwa ka tama baraq, ini ,mnduwa pshngak ka owda dndulan na, ya kiya ka pkla abunay ncahaya, asi ka msangay undo, kiya mi muda smiling ising hyaun ncahaya pnduwa. Pnyahan : Watan Diro / 編輯手:Robaw Harung
S.PHON: = luħaj baj undo = spoda ndan pnkla mita wħo pa, puqan ,sinaw, ini mnduwa mkan mi mimaħ, ini ttuku lmlu ka ħiji mi qtħuɾ ħaj, to so pusu baj abunaj bnbuɾ quɾu gaŋ,kija mi ħmɾinas tuɾu tukiŋal gaŋ u malu dan qmdaħaŋ kija. ida so mkla kana ka ħbaɾaw baj sədiq ou baj pkmalu ħiji ka undo, kʦka na ħija knmalu na baj pa, kija ka kmliħ mpusal pasənto (**%) abunaj bbuɾan gaŋ ka undo,kddijax lluħaj baj undo mtuɾul puŋkaŋ daw kija ka malu kmliħ abunaj dndulan gaŋ qtħuɾ iɾaq,gaŋ nunuħ mi gaŋ ɾuma kadi lbuwan, kija ka iju pdakaɾ duma gaŋ ka undo, malu pdakaɾ knɾudan uɾi. kndudul mɾana ka kŋkawas da ħaj, wada mkala ka dndulan naɾux gaŋ uɾi. naɾux kknɾudan ka naɾux gaŋ; kkluwan owda pkmalu naɾux gaŋ u, mɾaj so pkuɾuʦ, ħwaɾjaw, pkmalu pkɾdaxun, pkmalu so ʦbuwan budi uxaj daw so pkmalu ini ɾuji naɾux u niqan ini pntna dndulan na, muda smliq tama baɾaq, nəħunmi, əlu iɾaq lktu, ini ɾuji naɾux, pɾijux nŋaɾi, siŋkə, baɾaq, sopkowiʦ ħiji,mbba ka ɾajuħ mi lmlamu mnaɾux, malu muda kmliħ mkɾda pkmalu naɾux gaŋ bɾaħ mi pkmalu naɾux gaŋ bukuj ka undo, tokubəʦu baj ka so pmliħ baj so pkowiʦ ħiji, mmaɾi lŋluŋan mi so ini tblajaq lŋluŋan, pkbijax kana ħiji, pkɾana knmalu ħiji quɾi pkmalu kndusan u wada niqan pnkla dħa. knkal ijax sŋajan mntuɾu dħuq mnɾima mtuɾul puŋkaŋ undo tuʦka tubijax jojan uxaj daw pħmuk bijax (pkħŋak ħaɾi binaw so malu ppɾŋaw kaɾi nija) pkudus sipaw pkbijax ħiji, malu ptuɾa baj pmliħ dndulan ħiji ijax pkmalu naɾux uxaj daw babaw pkmalu naɾux. nasi mnnaɾux ka sədiq sʦuqi mowiʦ ħiji uka bɾaħan bbaɾaw dijax undo pa, malu spɾijux mntxal maxal puŋkaŋ, ana so ini kbsijaq mi pɾnaun ka muda, so malu dħuq ħmɾinas kbkuj mɾimal puŋkaŋ ka ndan knkana undo knkal ijax sŋajan. ini sɾħuqi ka muda smuŋ pkbijax ħiji bɾaħ undo undo ka sədiq mnaɾux gaŋ pa, ida asi ka qlħaŋun baj ka quɾi ħiji ta nanaq, so uxaj mpħuja ka ijax muda undo ʦida, mɾaj so tnuwiŋ tunux, tħmuk bɾaħ uxaj daw mnaɾux bɾaħ, ŋalun lħbun uxaj daw ini mnduwa ka tama baɾaq, ini ,mnduwa psħŋak ka owda dndulan na, ja kija ka pkla abunaj nʦaħaja, asi ka msaŋaj undo, kija mi muda smiliŋ isiŋ ħjaun nʦaħaja pnduwa. pnjaħan : watan diɾo / ***:ɾobaw ħaɾuŋ
